info.title: mcpval
info.description: Validate MCP servers for compliance, security, and AI safety. Checks protocol correctness, tests security posture, grades LLM-friendliness, and assigns trust levels (L1-L5).

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: MCP Validator — validate MCP servers for compliance, security, and AI safety

commands.name: report
commands.description: Generate reports from previous validation results
